me.headline: Discover your DAR
me.subhead: Enter your birth date — get a message about your nature, strength and path
me.value_dar: Name and description of your DAR
me.depth_sub: Add time, place and name — more precise calculation, deeper message.
me.depth_place_hint: City of birth. Coordinates will be filled automatically.
me.depth_name_hint: The name people know you by.
me.synthesis_sub: DARs combined by weight. The higher the percentage — the stronger the influence.

family.headline: Family
family.subhead: Loved ones and invited friends — all in one place.
family.empty_text: Understand your child, why you clash with your mother, what unites you with your partner.
family.invite_sub: Your friend calculates their DAR — and it unlocks in your Treasury.

treasury.headline: Treasury of DARs
treasury.collection_sub: Grid of 64 DARs with highlighted unlocked ones.
treasury.book_dars_sub: Complete guide to 64 DARs — in your language (RU / EN / ES).
treasury.book_parents_sub: Personal guide for your child's DAR. Opens from the child's card in Family.
treasury.search_sub: Find any DAR by code, name or field.
treasury.search_placeholder: 🔍 Search by code, name or field
treasury.game_hero_sub: Unlock loved ones' DARs via referrals or crystals — go through their story.
treasury.game_pvp_sub: PvP battles on DARs. Coming soon.
treasury.hof_sub: Top players and winners of the leaderboards.

arka.headline: Arka
arka.subhead: Your personal path in the rhythm of your DAR
arka.today_sub: Morning, daytime and evening rituals for your DAR. Gratitude journal. Oils gently woven into practice. Coming next.
arka.strategy_title: Strategy in the rhythm of your DAR
arka.strategy_sub: Goals, steps and an AI helper that thinks like your DAR. Available in the Guardian plan.
arka.path_sub: Mentor's brief, week analysis, income flows and growth plan. Available in the Master plan.

book.unavailable: The book is not yet available in this language.

science.title: Research
science.banner_title: Contribute to the science of DARs
science.banner_sub: Take the survey and become part of the first research on DARs

common.preview_warning: Prototype. This is a copy for testing the new architecture — data is not saved.

account.title: Account
account.profile_readonly_note: Data can't be changed. If there's a mistake — contact support.
